name: ListContainerRecipesRequest
description: ListContainerRecipesRequest schema from EC2 Image Builder

allOf.description: Returns container recipes belonging to the specified owner, that have been shared with you. You can omit this field to return container recipes belonging to your account.

Use the following filters to streamline results:

  • containerType

  • name

  • parentImage

  • platform
The maximum items to return in a request.
A token to specify where to start paginating. This is the NextToken from a previously truncated response.
